itemFields.id: string, unique category id, e.g. teaching
itemFields.title: string, visible category name
itemFields.icon: string, phosphor-like icon key used by JS
itemFields.visibleInFilters: boolean, show in top filter pills on gallery page
itemFields.visibleAsAlbum: boolean, show as large album card on gallery page
itemFields.hash: string, URL hash target, usually same as id
itemFields.coverImage: string|null, path to category cover image
itemFields.albumText: string, optional short text shown on album card

itemFields.filename: string, relative path to image file
itemFields.category: string, category id that this image belongs to
itemFields.title: string, internal / visible short title
itemFields.caption: string, visible caption under image on gallery page
itemFields.visible: boolean, whether the image appears in gallery grid
itemFields.featured: boolean, optional future use for highlights
itemFields.previewTargets: array of page ids where this image may be reused, e.g. ['home','teaching']

pageObjectFields.title: string, title of 3-image preview block
pageObjectFields.targetHash: string, category hash for the View Gallery button

items.label: string, short label shown under preview image

currentKeys.homeHeroPortrait: main portrait image in homepage hero
